description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from carlton london makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.UpperLeather upper with designer cut-outs, and has a wide ankle strap with a toe separatorHeel cup with a lace closure for a custom FitTPU footbed OutsoleDurable textured PU outsole with a mildly raised and textured heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
